## Gas Oils and Kerosenes with Uses in Products Available to Consumers Group
These substances were identified for action under the Chemicals Management Plan (CMP). The assessment focuses on 16 substances referred to collectively under the CMP as the Gas Oils and Kerosenes with Uses in Products Available to Consumers Group.
Risk management scope
Proposed conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities
Gas Oils and Kerosenes with Uses in Products Available to Consumers Group
Meets one or more of the criteria
See risk management scope
The list of substances included in this group is available in Appendix A of the assessment
Anticipated publication of the final assessment and proposed risk management approach.
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the draft assessment and the risk management scope. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 158, No. 18 .
Fifteen substances in the Gas Oils and Kerosenes with Uses in Products Available to Consumers Group were initially included among 42 substances assessed as a part of the Draft Screening Assessment for Gas Oils and Kerosenes. Following the publication of that draft assessment, additional human health information was considered, resulting in the removal of these 15 substances from the original group of 42 substances. In addition, new information was received relating to the ecological portion of the assessment, which resulted in a change to the proposed ecological conclusion for these substances, from harmful to not harmful to the environment at levels of exposure considered in the assessment.
The current draft assessment focuses on these 15 gas oils and kerosenes and a similar substance, CAS RN 64771-72-8.

## Twenty-six industry-restricted gas oils and kerosenes
These substances were identified for action under the CMP .
Public comments on the draft screening assessment and risk management scope
Conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities
Twenty-six industry-restricted gas oils and kerosenes
None planned at this time
The list of substances included in this group is available in Appendix A of the assessment
Publication of the final assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 157, No. 49 .
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the draft screening assessment and the risk management scope . The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 153, No. 19.
The 26 industry-restricted gas oils and kerosenes were initially included among 42 substances assessed as a part of the Draft Screening Assessment for Gas Oils and Kerosenes . Following the publication of the draft assessment, additional human health information was considered, which resulted in the removal of 16 substances from the original group of 42 substances:
- Fifteen of those substances have been evaluated as the Gas Oils and Kerosenes with Uses in Products Available to Consumers Group
- One of those substances (CAS RN 64724-88-7) has been evaluated with the Low Boiling Point Naphthas Group
